analyst_A.note: observe-only Grok research analyst that LEARNS the bot's trading patterns from its growing settled-trade/selectivity/late-window evidence and refines across cycles (continuity). Diagnostics only â never trades.

predictor_B.note: observe-only Grok P(up) per signal; graded vs realized BTC move before it could ever be trusted; never places/sizes/bypasses a trade.

grok_signal_intel.note: A analyzes signal-learning performance; B predicts P(up) per signal and is graded vs realized moves. Both observe-only â never place/size/bypass a trade; the execution gate remains the sole trade authority.

aggression.note: loosens (more explore/looser exploit/larger size) as acted trades profit; tightens on losses; circuit breaker is the hard floor.

grok_decider.note: Grok decides; bot executes (paper). shadow=decide+grade only (no trade), follow=engine follows direction/size subject to the deterministic floor (execution realism, risk caps, freshness). Fail-closed -> no_trade.

verifier.note: independent Claude maker-checker; can only veto/shrink a Grok-proposed paper trade, never force one; fail-open; PAPER ONLY.

last_note.summary: Only 2 settled trades (0% win rate, -$10 PnL) is utterly insufficient to claim any edge. The execution gate rejected 3 candidates for 'underdog_price_below_floor,' indicating the pricing model may be too conservative. With 11,649 candidates created but only 5 reaching execution (3 rejected), the pipeline is heavily throttledâdirectional filtering and execution costs are strangling opportunity. No statistically valid exploit/avoid contexts exist.

knob_recommendations.reason: Lower from ~0.515 to recover 3 rejected candidates; test if execution gate is overly conservative
Relax from current (unknown) to pass more of 10,533 skipped candidates; need volume to assess true edge
Raise from implicit low value; 2-sample buckets (all current contexts) are noise, not signal
Widen slightly if current is <0.01; tight spreads may not be necessary given small edge claims

new_lessons.rule: Demote any context (hurst_regime, zscore_bucket, etc.) to 'untrusted' if n<30; do not avoid/exploit on n=2
If >50% of costed candidates are rejected by execution gate, surface the dominant reject reason and test knob relaxation
When skipped>>rejected (10,533 vs 1,068), the directional filterânot edge modelâis the bottleneck; audit filter logic
Any context with 0% win rate and n<20 is noise; do not trade or demote until n>=50 or win_rate>0
Execution gate 'underdog_price_below_floor' rejections indicate EV model may be mis-calibrated; lower floor incrementally and measure fill quality

research_loop.note: strategy-layer research meta-loop: independent model proposes exploit/avoid contexts + bounded knob nudges + lessons. Observe-only unless auto_apply (whitelisted+bounded). PAPER ONLY.

recent.rule: hurst_regime=trending + markov_state=chop_noise went 0/2; avoid until n>=30 in regime shows >55% WR
hurst_regime=trending shows 0% win rate (n=2); avoid or require n>=50 before re-enabling
zscore_bucket=-1..1 has 0% win rate (n=2); require extreme z-score buckets (|z|>1.5) for edge
ttc_bucket=>=240s shows 0% win rate (n=2); prefer shorter time-to-close (<120s) for liquidity and alpha decay
underdog_price_below_floor rejected 3/5 gate candidates; floor likely above profitable entry zone
n=2 settled is statistically meaningless; all metrics (calibration, win rate, PnL) are noise until n>=100
Brier=0.303 vs baseline=0.25 appears bad, but n=2 makes this comparison statistically void
Demote any context (hurst_regime, zscore_bucket, etc.) to 'untrusted' if n<30; do not avoid/exploit on n=2
If >50% of costed candidates are rejected by execution gate, surface the dominant reject reason and test knob relaxation
When skipped>>rejected (10,533 vs 1,068), the directional filterânot edge modelâis the bottleneck; audit filter logic

tradingview.stop_condition: ingest only â never trade authority

loops.note: formalized sub-loops (data/signal/verify/execute/risk/research/news/lessons); each has a trigger + skill + verifier + verifiable stop + a liveness watchdog (last_beat_age_s/stalled). PAPER ONLY.

arbitrage.note: arb halt only on anomaly (guaranteed_profit<=0); risk-free P&L is segregated

dependency_arbitrage.note: Lane B halt on booking anomaly only; walk-forward is observability

stop_conditions.note: quantitative kill switches checked each tick from settled ledger evidence; NOT the LLM's opinion. Halting blocks NEW entries only.

promotion.note: observe-only diagnostic; eligible buckets are NOT auto-promoted to trading authority unless promotion_allowed_by_config is true AND explicitly wired. The execution gate remains the sole trade authority.

cex_lead_edge.promotion_rule: n>=min AND wilson_lower(win_rate)>breakeven AND Brier_cex<Brier_market AND avg_pnl>0
cex_lead_edge.note: CEX-lead latency edge; benchmark is the MARKET price (already ~0.21 Brier). SHADOW grades only; GATED can PROPOSE a side on a proven bucket but the execution-quality gate + safety floor remain authoritative. PAPER ONLY.

arbitrage.note: risk-free dutch book: BUY-both (asks<$1) + SELL-both (mint $1 set, sell bids>$1); deterministic P&L; NEVER blended into directional. PAPER ONLY.

last_violations.description: 15m up-mid below nested 5m up-mid: P(up_15m) cannot be < P(up_5m) for overlapping window

dependency_arbitrage.note: LCMM nested-window scanner + optional paper execution on validated nested_implication violations; outcome-settled P&L + optional Kelly.

arb_graph.note: Graph is rebuilt each tick from open windows; Grok edges are never tradable alone.

proposal.description: Both 5m windows fully contained inside 15m window 4:15-4:30

baseline_cohort_gate.note: baseline quant path: 180-240s TTC band (scaled on 15m), high edge + strong CEX; UP blocked until promoted; green_path=15m DOWN cohort only (TV observe-only)

learned_selectivity_gate.note: rejects ONLY buckets confidently below their own breakeven win-rate (Wilson upper bound < breakeven AND net-negative PnL); coin-flip / not-significant buckets are NOT rejected. Can only make the bot MORE selective â never trades, resizes, or bypasses the execution gate. Exploration tracked separately.

bucket_evidence.rule: blocked iff confidently_losing AND fdr_significant (Wilson upper < breakeven, PF < min, BH-FDR q=0.10)

counterfactual.note: in-sample replay using final accumulated bucket evidence (diagnostic estimate)

gate.note: when enabled, only late-window AND high-conviction setups may trade; can only PREVENT trades, never force/size/bypass the execution gate.

edge_measurement.note: observe-only: grades whether late-window high-conviction trades win more (cohort vs other) from live settled trades; never affects trading.

tradingview.note: TradingView alerts are candidate signals only â they cannot place, resize, or bypass trades; the strategy + execution gate remain the sole trade authority.

edge_vs_5min_outcome.note: observe-only: did the TradingView signal at entry predict the 5-min Chainlink outcome (signal_hit_rate vs baseline_up_rate), and did aligning help the bot win (aligned vs opposed bot_win_rate)? Never affects trading.

rsi_trend.note: observe-only: learns P(next 5-min outcome | RSI alert trend state) from the alert history and scores its own next-window predictions. Never trades.

promotion.note: observe-only diagnostic; eligible buckets are NOT auto-promoted to trading authority unless promotion_allowed_by_config is true AND explicitly wired. The execution gate remains the sole trade authority.

signal_gate.note: when active, a paper trade is taken only if a fresh TradingView signal agrees with the side; it can only PREVENT trades, never force or bypass them.

context_gate.note: hard prior gate: blocks proven-losing entry contexts (volume spikes, noise regime, far-from-resolution) before enough samples exist for the learned selectivity gate. Can only PREVENT trades â never forces, sizes, or bypasses the execution gate, which remains the sole trade authority.

down_bias_gate.note: restrict-only: harvest DOWN/TV asymmetry by blocking proven-losing UP stacks

mtf_gate.note: observe-only conflict veto: blocks 4m/5m fast-pair conflict only (loop arch default). require_confirm/side_align are opt-in restrict-only layers, not trade authority.

confidence_tier.note: At 15m TTC sweet spot, TV MTF regime adjusts min_edge/max_price only. TV trade gates remain off per operator lock.
